meaning: n.(传说中的)美人鱼,<美>女子游泳健将
examples: No one would buy her knowing that it was the real Little Mermaid.
It was really rather irritating to children who had never seen a mermaid.
Zambello's work on Broadway includes directing a stage version of Disney's The Little Mermaid in 2008.
As soon as we pulled that mermaid up, I knew I was in for it.
